name: Szechuan Shrimp and Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 pound medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
2 teaspoons szechuan style pepper blend, divided
8 ounces fresh snow pea pods or sugar snap peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the linguine according to package directions.
2. In a separate skillet, sprinkle shrimp with 1 teaspoon szechuan style pepper blend. Heat 1 tablespoon oil over medium-high heat. Add shrimp and season with garlic powder and ginger. Stir-fry for 3 minutes or until shrimp turn pink. Set aside.
3. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon oil to the skillet. Stir-fry bell pepper strips and pea pods for 2 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
4. In a bowl, combine water, cornstarch, soy sauce, and the remaining 1 teaspoon szechuan style pepper blend. Pour the mixture into the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
5. Return the shrimp to the skillet and heat through. Serve the pasta over the linguine. Makes 4 servings.
